case_title: BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC VS. TERESA ARAGON et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL FINANCIAL I, INC. SERVED FEB-12-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARAGON, TERESA
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL FINANCIAL I, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL FINANCIAL I, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARAGON, TERESA $9,890.13 PRINCIPAL, $1,325.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $284.50 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,499.63, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $284.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ARAGON, TERESA
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
NOTICE AND MOTION TO CORRECT NAME NUNC PRO TUNC, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL FINANCIAL I, INC. HEARING SET FOR OCT-19-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC'S MOTION TO CORRECT NAME NUNC PRO TUNC (FROM BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC. TO BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO BENEFICIAL FINANCIAL I INC.) IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-19-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT PER ORDER PLAINTIFF SUED INCORRECTLY AS BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC TO BE BENEFICIAL FINANCIAL I, INC.

calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Correct Name Nunc Pro Tunc
Off Calendar Oct-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC'S MOTION TO CORRECT NAME NUNC PRO TUNC (from Beneficial California Inc. to Beneficial California Inc. successor by merger to Beneficial Financial I Inc.). The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
